data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_LIGHTWEIGHT: {"version":1,"epicId":"f2be-1da6","generatedAt":"2026-04-05T22:45:41Z","generatedBy":"preplanning-lightweight","epic":{"title":"Configurable approach resolution strategy for implementation-plan","description":"Add implementation_plan.approach_resolution config key to control proposal resolution strategy","successCriteria":["Config key with autonomous/interactive values, default autonomous","Autonomous dispatches decision-maker, preserves escalation escape hatch","Interactive displays proposals to user, skips agent dispatch","Sprint-vs-standalone context detection removed from SKILL.md","Direct invocation with default config produces APPROACH_DECISION without user prompt"]},"stories":[],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":0,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":[]}}
